message:
client: Strip crossorigin attribute from Vite production HTML

Vite 7 hardcodes crossorigin on injected script/link tags.
Tauri's tauri:// custom protocol doesn't serve CORS headers,
so WKWebView silently blocks the assets. A post-build plugin
strips the attribute.

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/l2i7fpohi3nx7ly20z4shzn2
